extract: Reflect (Japanese: リフレクター Reflector) is a non-damaging Psychic-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM33 in Generation I, from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM09 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TM18 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM074 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM031 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It is the physical counterpart to Light Screen.
